selection.selection_rule: Rows from standard_source_table whose helm_candidate.source_batch is catalog/owned_repair_batch43.json and candidate_status is repaired_pending_judge_rerun.

verdicts.observed: Repaired candidate is a yellow square notice board on a black post with the prior center-ring/diamond detail removed.
verdicts.expected: Yellow conspicuous notice board should be a yellow square board on a post.
verdicts.judge_comments: Pass pending human: required yellow board/post silhouette is present and the old diamond/ring placeholder is gone. Scale and stroke weight are Helm styling differences only; no final approval implied.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.observed: Repaired candidate is a red square notice board with a white diagonal prohibition slash and black outer stroke.
verdicts.expected: Prohibition notice mark should be a red square board with a diagonal prohibition slash.
verdicts.judge_comments: Pass pending human: prohibition board shape, red/white/black colour family, and slash semantics are restored. No final approval implied.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.observed: Repaired candidate is a red square regulation/restriction board with a centered white square field and black outline.
verdicts.expected: Regulation/restriction notice mark should be a red square regulation-board mark.
verdicts.judge_comments: Pass pending human: the diamond placeholder is gone and the red regulation board with white field preserves the requested restriction-board semantics. No final approval implied.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.observed: Repaired candidate is a white information board on a post with a black letter i.
verdicts.expected: Information/recommendation notice mark should match the reference notice-board mark; the available OpenCPN witness is a blue/black square notice mark, not a posted white information sign.
verdicts.judge_comments: Fail: the repair removes the diamond but changes the reference color family and silhouette by introducing a white posted board and text glyph. Human review may later accept a different convention, but this standard rerun cannot.
verdicts.required_change: Replace with the NOTMRK03 reference information/recommendation notice-board shape and preserve the blue/black reference colour family or provide explicit metadata justifying the alternate white-board convention.

verdicts.observed: Repaired candidate is a vertical orange tick line.
verdicts.expected: One-minute ownship-vector mark should be the thin reference tick/line mark; the provider witness is a short black horizontal vector tick.
verdicts.judge_comments: Fail: the repair restores a tick-like line but changes both orientation and colour family relative to the available reference, which is load-bearing for this line/tick symbol.
verdicts.required_change: Use the OSPONE02 one-minute vector tick as a short reference-aligned black tick/line, or record explicit orientation/colour metadata before rerun approval.

verdicts.observed: Repaired candidate is a black hash/grid mark with three vertical strokes crossed by a horizontal stroke.
verdicts.expected: Six-minute ownship-vector mark should remain a thin reference tick/line mark; the provider witness is a short black horizontal vector tick.
verdicts.judge_comments: Fail: the candidate is no longer a simple vector tick/line and introduces hash/grid semantics not present in the row reference.
verdicts.required_change: Replace the hash/grid mark with the OSPSIX02 six-minute vector tick/line geometry matching the reference line semantics.

verdicts.observed: Repaired candidate is an orange target/crosshair with outer circle, full horizontal/vertical cross lines, and center dot.
verdicts.expected: Own ship constant-size symbol should match the reference target/ownship mark; the provider witness is a black circular target with inner ring and no full cross axes.
verdicts.judge_comments: Fail: the candidate is a recognisable ownship-like target, but it changes the reference colour family and adds crosshair axes that are not in the provider witness.
verdicts.required_change: Render OWNSHP01 as the reference constant-size ownship target, preserving the circular target/ring semantics and reference colour family without extra crosshair axes unless metadata explicitly requires them.

verdicts.observed: Repaired candidate is an orange triangular ownship arrow with a center line, crossbar, and conning dot.
verdicts.expected: Own ship drawn to scale with conning position should show the scaled hull/ship outline and conning-position cue; the provider witness is a narrow black vessel/hull outline.
verdicts.judge_comments: Fail: conning-position intent is present, but the scaled vessel silhouette is replaced by a triangular target/arrow and the reference colour family is changed.
verdicts.required_change: Use a scaled hull/ship outline matching OWNSHP05 reference geometry with a conning-position cue; do not substitute a generic triangular ownship arrow.

verdicts.observed: Repaired candidate is a blue circular pier/harbor mark with an internal right-angle pier extension cue.
verdicts.expected: Pier with no surveyed extension should be the blue circular pier/harbor reference mark with pier extension cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Pass pending human, with low confidence: the repair preserves the blue circular mark and an internal pier-extension cue, although the cue is simplified versus the small OpenCPN raster. No final approval implied.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.observed: Repaired candidate is an orange surrounding ellipse.
verdicts.expected: Planned-position arrival-time surround should be a red/orange ellipse.
verdicts.judge_comments: Pass pending human: ellipse shape and planned-position red/orange colour family are preserved. No final approval implied.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.observed: Repaired candidate is an orange plus/crosshair with both horizontal and vertical strokes.
verdicts.expected: Planned-position crossline should preserve the reference crossline annotation; the provider witness is a single red/orange horizontal line segment.
verdicts.judge_comments: Fail: the repair changes a line annotation into a crosshair/plus mark, altering the line semantics for the planned-position row.
verdicts.required_change: Replace the plus/crosshair with the PLNPOS02 planned-position crossline geometry, preserving the single-line/oriented-line semantics from the reference.

verdicts.observed: Repaired candidate is an orange rectangular speed box with an S label.
verdicts.expected: Planned-route speed-to-make-good box should be a red/orange rectangular speed box.
verdicts.judge_comments: Pass pending human, with low confidence: rectangular speed-box shape and planned-route colour family are restored. The S label is treated as non-final Helm annotation and still needs human/crop review before any final approval.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.observed: Repaired candidate is an orange dashed rectangular speed box with an S label.
verdicts.expected: Alternate-route speed-to-make-good box should be the alternate planned-speed rectangular box.
verdicts.judge_comments: Pass pending human, with low confidence: alternate planned-speed box meaning and orange colour family are present. The dashed outline/S label remain human-review details and this artifact grants no final approval.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.observed: Repaired candidate is an orange circle with diagonal X strokes.
verdicts.expected: Ownship position fix should be the orange position-fix crosshair; the provider witness shows an orange circle with orthogonal crosshair/plus axes.
verdicts.judge_comments: Fail: colour and circular family are correct, but the diagonal X changes the position-fix crosshair semantics.
verdicts.required_change: Replace the diagonal X with the POSITN02 orthogonal position-fix crosshair/plus geometry while preserving the orange colour family.
